_why: Single source of truth for the Open WebUI model record. All fields map directly to Open WebUI Admin > Models. Keeping this in version control ensures every deployment is reproducible and auditable.
name: AI-OS · Nemotron Ultra
description: Production AI-OS runtime powered by NVIDIA Nemotron-3-Ultra-550B via NIM Free Tier. Optimised for reasoning, architecture analysis, and production code generation.

nim_free_tier.notes: Free Tier has no SLA. Shared infrastructure means latency is non-deterministic. Context > 65K tokens produces severe latency degradation. Keep active context below 65K at all times.
